title: Add --retry support to manifest push
body:
This PR enables retry behavior for podman manifest push across CLI, remote clients, and REST API.

Changes include:

New flags: --retry, --retry-delay
CLI flags stored in ImagePushOptions and applied to local and remote pushes
REST API accepts retry and retryDelay query parameters
Manpages and Swagger docs updated
e2e tests ensure retry settings take effect

Fixes: #28590

comments.body: Cockpit tests failed for commit 6d32823a69ea88c848f7f1c8961a9598efd696d9. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

> @ValentinTorassa, is it ready for review? 

Yepp
Please rebase on main.
LGTM once rebased and the tests adjustments are tended to.
Thanks for the reviews @Honny1 @TomSweeneyRedHat. Done, rebased and test adjusted.
Thanks @Honny1 @TomSweeneyRedHat. Both suggestions applied (PodmanExitCleanly in the new test, dropped the error wrap in manifest.go) and rebased on main.

Thanks @Honny1. Both points addressed: dropped the `if` around `options.RetryDelay` in the REST handler (it's a plain string) and removed the `SkipIfRemote` in the new options test now that the REST API actually plumbs retry. Rebased on main.
/packit retest-failed
CI is green now. I updated the new manifest retry-options e2e case to skip remote mode, matching the existing retry-defaults test since retry warnings are not relayed through the remote client.
@ValentinTorassa, can you please rebase on upstream main?

Thanks for the reviews! Pushed an update that should cover everything:

- Dropped the `SkipIfRemote` on the *push must retry with options* test like you suggested, @Luap99. The flags now run on the remote client too — I just put the retry-warning check (which the remote setup doesn't relay) behind a `!IsRemote()` guard, and assert the exit code + `connect: connection refused` everywhere. Same idea as the artifact-pull retry test.
- That's also what was making the test fail, @TomSweeneyRedHat — it was matching the local-only warning line as the exit error. Matching the final error fixes it for both local and remote.
- The earlier bits from your reviews @Honny1 (defaults test, `PodmanExitCleanly`, no error wrapping, dropping the `RetryDelay` `if`) are all still in.

Also squashed it down to one commit and rebased on the latest main to grab the recent CI changes. Let me know if anything else looks off!
